title: SSE reconnect has no backoff — tight loop on server failure
description: Trigger: SSE server endpoint is unavailable, returns an error, or closes immediately. Condition: spawn_sse_task() is called with zero delay whenever SseNotification::StreamEnded is received. The new task immediately tries to connect, fails, and sends StreamEnded again. Bad behavior: reconnect attempts loop as fast as the OS allows, hammering the server with connection attempts (potentially thousands per second), consuming CPU, and flooding server logs. No exponential backoff is applied.
